Vikat Platform

VSentinel

The Security Performance & Optimization Engine

VSentinel is the performance accountability layer for your entire agentic security stack. It scores the effectiveness of every VCommand triage decision, every VShield policy enforcement, and every VInsight recommendation — turning security operations into a data-driven, continuously improving function with board-reportable metrics.

See VSentinel in Action →
By the Numbers

What VSentinel measures
across your security stack.

20–40%
MTTR Reduction

Within 6 months, measured against your pre-engagement MTTR baseline across all incident categories

82/100
Decision Quality

Composite score evaluating triage accuracy, containment effectiveness, and false positive rate across all automated decisions

77%
Playbook Optimization

Percentage of security playbooks reaching fully optimized status — zero rework, zero manual override, below target MTTR

100%
Board-Ready Metrics

Every metric formatted for executive and board consumption — trend lines, benchmarks, and improvement evidence

Capabilities

Measure. Benchmark.
Optimize.

Decision Quality Scoring

Evaluates the accuracy and effectiveness of every security decision — triage classifications, containment actions, escalation routing — scored against outcomes over time.

Response Velocity Tracking

Tracks MTTR, MTTC (contain), and MTTA (acknowledge) across incident types, teams, and time periods. Decomposes where response slows and quantifies the cost.

Automation Accuracy

Measures precision and recall of automated security actions — false positive rates, missed detections, automation confidence scores. Identifies where automation helps and where it hurts.

Team Leaderboards

MTTR leaderboards by team and by incident category. CloudSec, DevSecOps, SOC teams benchmarked against each other and against their own historical performance.

Optimization Recommendations

Data-driven recommendations: which playbooks to refine, which manual steps to automate, where to reallocate analyst time — prioritized by measurable impact.

Continuous Improvement Loops

Performance data feeds back into VShield policy tuning, VCommand triage calibration, and VInsight process mining — creating a self-improving security operations cycle.

How It Works

From platform telemetry to
performance accountability.

Integrations

Scores performance across
your entire security operation.

VSentinel ingests telemetry from every Vikat platform component and your existing security tools — providing a single pane of performance accountability.

Ingests From

VCommand

Every triage decision, severity classification, and containment action scored for accuracy, speed, and effectiveness against measured outcomes.

Ingests From

VShield

Every policy evaluation, guardrail check, and block decision analyzed for false positive rates, coverage gaps, and enforcement effectiveness.

Ingests From

VInsight

Process mining data, friction scores, and optimization recommendations tracked for adoption rate and measured impact over time.

Ingests From

SIEM / SOAR

Incident outcomes from Splunk, Sentinel, CrowdStrike — closing the loop between detection, response, and resolution effectiveness.

Delivers To

Executive Reporting

Board-ready dashboards, CISO scorecards, and quarterly trend reports — formatted for non-technical stakeholders with clear improvement evidence.

Delivers To

SOC Team Leads

MTTR leaderboards, team benchmarks, analyst performance data, and workload distribution insights — actionable for operational managers.

Part of the Stack

VSentinel works with
the full Vikat platform.

Threat Triage Engine
VSentinel scores every VCommand triage decision — measuring accuracy, speed, and containment effectiveness.

VShield
Runtime Guardrails

VInsight
Process Intelligence
